subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh the truth is verily the Hidden One mentioned in His Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لهو المکنون فی کتبه و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
